title: Creamy Irish Stew
description: A twist on the classic Irish stew, this vegetarian version swaps the traditional beef for a creamy, flavorful twist.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the diced carrots and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Pour in the vegetable broth and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
Stir in the creamy sauce mix and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until heated through.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley.
Enjoy with a side of crusty bread or over mashed potatoes.
